riskReasons: Java 8 to Java 11 requires removed-module and illegal-access validation

workItems.title: Run baseline tests in CI before migration changes
workItems.rationale: A Java migration needs a known failing/passing baseline before changing runtime, framework, or build configuration.

findings.title: Java 8 to 11 migration needs a compatibility baseline
findings.evidence: Declared Java version is 8; target Java version is 11
findings.recommendation: Run the full test suite on Java 8, then establish a separate Java 11 branch that validates removed Java EE modules, reflection warnings, build plugins, and runtime images.

findings.title: maven-surefire-plugin should be upgraded before Java 11 test baselining
findings.recommendation: Upgrade Surefire/Failsafe to a Java 11 compatible baseline before trusting migration test results.

findings.title: Reflective access should be reviewed before Java 11+ migration
findings.recommendation: Run tests on Java 11 with warnings enabled and remove or explicitly contain illegal reflective access.

findings.title: Removed Java EE/JAXB API usage blocks a clean Java 11 migration
findings.recommendation: Add explicit dependencies or migrate the affected API before moving the runtime to Java 11.
